subject: What about blogging
body: I’ve just spent the last 30mins or so reading some articles I printed yesterday on BBC News relating to Google and Blogging. It appears that Blogging is... well, huge. Yeah in case you didn’t already know that, its fuckin massive. Blogger had 200,000 users last year, yup a full year ago, before Google took over! Now I cant imagine how many millions of people use Blogger along. Livejournal say they have 3,082,448 subscribers, of which 1,482,196 are described as active. And there are so many more blogging services and tools out there! Me on the other hand, I’m not trying to get publicity, fame or to be noticed. I just feel its time to put some stuff on the web. In my case a lot of pictures, because I love taking pictures of the world around me and the people with me. I realised this about a year ago really. That pictures must be taken of things that happen to us or else we will just forget these things happened. I’m not going to go mad on the self-indulgent, self-opinionated drivel that comes from a lot of blogs. I want mine to be a place where I can share the out of the ordinary, bizarre, slightly interesting, accounts of my days. Maybe the odd rant, the odd bit of opinion (well I’m not going to be writing much of other people’s opinions), the occasional boring stuff… but I will keep that to a minimum. So basically, I don’t care if you read this or not. I’m not writing this for the masses, nor am I doing it so I can get more ‘virtual friends’, I’m simply doing it as a way of recording my life, through pictures and words. If you are some random stranger living in a distant land, or round the corner, that’s fine by me… just don’t come looking for me cos you were slightly offended by anything I may say! Google revamps blogging service (BBC News) A Blog For Everyone (BBC News) All over for blogs? (BBC News) Fame or misfortune beckons for weblogs? (BBC News) I blog, therefore I am (BBC News)

subject: Low pay for Belfast!
body: It would appear as though we have made the news! The Register. has an article on the research which was carried out recently by Invest NI showing that Belfast technology workers are some of the lowest paid in Europe. Only Bangalore in India, and Budapest and Prague in Eastern Europe, have lower salary levels. The data also shows that IT workers in Dublin are paid dramatically more than Belfast workers, with wages coming in 27 per cent higher on average in the capital of the Republic of Ireland. Possibly the most expensive city on Earth to hire IT staff is San Francisco, where a head of IT will earn some €165,331 per year, on average, compared to €91,251 in Belfast and €107,253 in Dublin. Is this fair!?

subject: Bye Bye NTL
body: So i found out the other day that some guy from BT had been round at the house and spoke to my dad. He managed to pursuade him to get rid of NTL and "go back to BT". I dont know what the guy said, but i would like to know. But its all good! I dont really care about the NTL phone line, its the channels (few as they are) and the NTL phone line, its the Internet that i care about! I think we will definately stick with NTL for the internet. The fact that they are increasing all the speeds is the main thing making me want to stay! According to the article on The Register they are increasing the 150k to 300k (thats me!), the 600k is to increase to 750k and 1mb moving up to 1.5mb, and all for the same price as before (except the 1mb which will be increased by £3)! Though they have strong competition from BT who are reducing their prices by 70% and Telewest who are increasing their speeds and freezing their prices (which are less than NTL's!), they are also going to provide the first 3MB connection in the UK! This is all to happen in the summer! As for the TV. We're getting SKY!! So im pretty happy about that! Apparently we're getting about 200 channels! Its all good!!

subject: Hay Fever Sucks!
body:
I have diagnosed myself with having Hay Fever. I do seem to have the symptoms:
  • Runny, sometimes streaming nose.
  • Sneezing.
  • Stuffy, blocked nose.
  • Itching in the throat and nose.
  • Headaches (also known as sinusitis).
  • Watery, itchy, red eyes.
  • Inability to taste or smell food.
  • Disturbed sleep.
  • Itchy ears.
I've had some of these symptoms before, but never as bad as they've been recently! Gotta go to Doc and get this sorted.

subject: The Internet Sucks...
body:
10:54am - I think it could be time to take a break from the internet. I could put it down to a few reasons for why my life over the last year (or 10 years?) has been on my computer, as well as the fact I have nothing else to do and no where else to go during the week. But now that I am nearly finished school, I will not be spending as much time on the internet at all. I will find another addiction, get another habit. Try watching movies, playing games, pick up the guitar again, may even start reading books! 

What ever it is it will be off the computer. I feel stupid talking to people who don’t use computers/internet as much as I do. Trying to explain to them how good it is is very hard. Explaining how much of a community environment can be found on the internet. Through forums especially, you can talk to hundreds of people and hear what they have to say; sharing opinions, feelings and helping each other. It does feel good talking to a lot of people across the world, finding out that they really aren’t much different from me, that there are people who feel the same as I do. But what I try to remember is that the internet is not real life. 

These are not the people in my life, the people that matter. This is just another way of life, but not the primary one. I sometimes feel that I forget that. Forget how to interact with real people. No ‘LOLs’ and shit like that.

subject: Its really depressing
body: I've just spent the last hour or so looking through various communities here on LiveJournal and I gotta say I think its really depressing. Yes, I spend a lot of time on my computer, and the internet, but I dont go posting pictures of myself and information about me all over the net for others to read in the hope that I will quite literally be "accepted into their community." Reading about the information that people post on these things, hoping that they will be 'rated highly' or loved by all. And then there are the people who reject others saying stuff like, "no, just no, cos im a bitch and i dont like you," or "no, your ugly" etc. WHY! Why do people look to be accepted by random people half way across the world. These people dont mean shit! Its not these people that matter to you. Will you be happier if these people find you attractive, love your interests and appreciate that you promote their community only so it can go on again in this never ending circle of virtual hatred, bitchiness and love. If you want to do it, fine. Just know that these people do mean shit. They dont know the real you! Nor do they really care,

subject: No money, my computer and more virtual friends
body: So over the last 2 weeks i have been on my computer solidly just about all day, of everyday, and I've Enjoyed a lot of my days. Although i wish i could do more and could have done more in the first 2-3 weeks since finishing school, i know that it hasnt been feesably possible - my funds havent allowed for any costly activities. Unfortunately i have no been able to get any over time in work, which has really pissed me off. It was my big plan for the summer; to work everyday, about 30-40 hrs a week, and get £600-£700 a month. But that hasnt been happening at all. I have only been doing my contracted 10 hrs a week. Its fucking stupid really, they actually hired a few more people in my department (and i think a few other departments too). WHY!? Everyone, most people, want overtime in the summer! I want overtime in the summer!, and im sure one of the main reasons i havent been getting it is because of the damn new-starts taking the extra hrs. Its been suggested to me to get a new job, and i've thought about it, but i have been told that i should be able to get over time in about 2 or 3 weeks, this was about 2 weeks ago. I am hoping i will be able to get overtime soon, and up to the end of the summer. I will also be hoping to transfer to another branch near the university if i get in, so i cant leave yet anyway. If i dont get to uni this year i will probably get a better job somewhere and work for a year etc. So working was my primary aim of the summer. My other was to spend a lot of time out of the house and off my computer... that has not been going well at all. As I've already said, i have spend everyday lately on my computer. I do like it, but i would be so much happier if i could have it differently. I want people... but then i realise that i dont have people. The people i care about... dont feel the same way. So i am left here while they are galavanting around, me probably not on their minds at all. Some would say its easy... but i cant just go uninvited. I do have some people i could visit, but they're really boring and sit around the house all day reading etc. I have absolutely no money which naturally limts all that i can do. So until now i will stay put i guess. I realise that i miss ronan more than i thought i would. One of the main reasons is because is one of the only real friends i have and vice versa. We are most always going to be doing fuck all until plans are made between us both. He gets back from France sometime next week. He will have no money, naturally, but i should hopefully have a little, birthday money and my pay, so that should get us somewhere i guess. It'll get me off my computer and out of the house a bit more anyway. And Rachel, I am here, doing fuck all, gimme a call sometime... So this afternoon, i was awoken by my manager. He let me know that i was supposed to be working from 9am to 5pm this today. This i am certain i was not made aware of, any extra hours i would most definately made a note of! Still half asleep i told him that i would come in a 3pm and work until 9pm. I am pretty pleased about this. Its what i have wanted. I just wished it could happen a little more. I am strangly really happy at the minute, i just feel i could be a lot happier. I guess the main reason that i am so happy at the minute is because i have finished school. I dont know if everyone else feels as pleased as i do, but i just cant get over it. Im in limbo. I am unsure whether i will get the grades required to get into my chosen university course. If it does happen i will be extremely pleased. If it doesnt, i know i will be a little disappointed, but its something that i am preparing for as i am not in anyway expecting straight As. If that does happen i will find a job and work for a year, getting into uni next year, or to a course which requires less grades and can enable me to skip the first year of the degree course (forget correct name of this course). So at the minute im just fuckin around. Sleeping until 1pm, not going to sleep until 3-4am, spending all day on computer and having no commitments. Its a great lifestyle, for a while. Theres no way i could do this all the time, but im liking it at the minute. Hopefully things will get better...

subject: There's so much beauty in the world
body: Mum came back today, saw her briefly before heading out to see Shrek 2 with my brother, more on that later. She, however, is still her usual self. Its after half three and i feel really good. Ive just watched my new favourite film; American Beauty. It is a lot of what i love about life and how i feel about life. That there is so much beauty. I dont give a fuck about the conventionally 'hot' chick with blonde hair, big tits and long legs. I would rather be with someone who is honest, about life and about themselves. That girl in the film is so beautiful. I am definately going to start going to a gym. Be more productive... There is so much about my current living state that i wish i could change. And if i could tomorrow i would. Unfortuately i need money to do most of these things. But because i am in a time of my life between posts, nothing set to stone as to what i am definately going to do after the summer, i can do a lot of things. I could leave the shit supermarket part-time job and get a fairly decent, for my age, full-time job, earn plenty of money, for my age, and enjoy myself, or go to university and have little money, but be out of the house and have a nice loan to look after me. They both have their pro's and con's. If i do get to university i will go for it. If i dont, i will also be pretty happy. Although i probably wont be able to move out, i will have a job and enough money to keep me happy. I will be able to get the material things that will make me happy for a while. Some new clothes, few upgrades to the computer, that sort of thing. But thats all that i really want. Other than that i just want to be happy and comfortable. As long as i have people around me that i love i dont need material things. "I want to look good naked"

subject: Shrek 2
body: I felt a little lost having not seen all of the original movie. I remember watching it shortly after it was out on dvd, but getting a little bored half way through - not even half way through in fact. I just wasnt in the mood. Ever since then i wish i had seen it. I guess i just havent had the chance. But ever since i saw the trailers for the sequal I've been in fits of laughter and eagerly awaiting its release. The Google was a bundle of laughs the whole way through. I loved it. The soundtrack was spectacular. It was full of surprises and kept me hanging on for the entire duration. i have heard a few people say that its not better than the original... i have seen some clips since my first brief encouter and i regret not finding it as funny then as i do now. I feel there is something missing having not seen it. My goal is to ultimately see the original and then i think i will feel a lot better. Definately one (or two) to add to any great movie collection!

subject: Spidey-Sense...
body: There has to be a sequal - though i have read that there will be one so no need to think too hard about it. Tonight i saw Spider-man 2. The eagerly awaited sequal. I will start by saying; it was worth the wait! Secondly, to get it out of the way, i will say; Kirsten Dunst is so very very hot!! 2 years after first being biten by the spider, Peter Parker is having trouble holding a job as a delivery boy, newspaper photographer and falling behind in his school work. Of course spiderman is to blame. Then there's Mary Jane. The love of his life, but is she his prioty? Does he have his prioties in order? A major identity crisis takes over. Then he meets Otto Octavius. He is a scientist who is trying to create a fusion energy source, and being funded by Harry Osborn's Company as a means of bringing more fortune to himself. Harry is also determined to discover the true identity of Spider-Man. All of this comes together nicely in an amazing film filled with great action scenes and great special effects. There are a few things that anoyed me about the film. First there is Peter Parker's inability to talk. He stays silent too much. He is a nervous guy... but that nervous? Also the script. Some of those lines are unbelievable. But it is a comic book so can we really expect much more, and its also made with kids in mind as well as the adults. Overall i loved it!! I would see it again, if seeing movies more than once in the cinema was my thing, but its not.

subject: Six Days
body: I'm becoming what i did not want to become. Im getting to like this journal thing too much, and its turning into the first and last site I visit every day. Im beginning to write stupid crap for the s ake of it instead of semi-inteligent rants about life, politics, movies, music and technology. But do I want to do that either? I dont even know. All I know is im not happy. I want to actually dostuff and then write about it, just just eternally write in hopppe that something better will happen and that eventually I will get off this computer and get a Fucking Life! I am just doing this to pass the time. I want more! At first I thought the whole journal thing was stupid. In some ways I do still believe that. Im still not going to go into lots of detail about my life and the people around me, cos personally not everyone needs to know everything - and if i do say anything it sure wont be for the whole world to read. I do realise that it is a good idea. It gives me somwhere to write down my thoughts and for those i know to understand me slightly, if thats's possible. The way I want it to be is that I actually write about stuff that happens occasionally. But nothing ever happens. The scary thing is - I have only 6 days left to wait... In SIX days things will change. Ever since June I have simple been living to pass the time until Aug 19th. That is when i get my results. I will be doing one of two options. If my results go one way I will be going to Magee University, Derry to try and start a new life and live in a world where I dont get mocked on my way to the local shop. If that doesnt happen I will have to stay right here; get a full time job and work on going to Uni next year. Of course this option wont be too bad - and in a way im also looking forward to it. The way I see it is that this is my life and i decide what happens and whether I enjoy it or not. Not getting to university is not the end of the world. There are plenty of other good options. And whatever does happen I am going to make sure it is good and that I enjoy it. If i do go for the 2nd option I will have plenty of money and i know that in the short term money will make me happy for a while. I know money isnt everything, but i will be hapapy for a while with some. Then maybe i will be able to write something worth while here...

The movie in question is Wonderland. In short - this was one awesome, fucked up, truthful mind-blowing, wonderful film. Its about John Holmes, a legendary porn star in the 60s and 70s. The story revolves around the murder of 4 people in a house on Wonderland Avenue on July 1, 1981. We hear the story from both David Lind, one of the 'lads' and John himself. Both giving slightly different stories as to what happened in an attempt to discover who killed, or who should be convicted of committing this quadruple homicide. The film reveals the seedy world of drugs and violence in such great detail and was a thril to watch! Great film, great day outdoors!

subject: ACCEPTED AND PLACED!!
body:
Lots of commotion with me today... actually it starts from last night. Mum and Chris had minor car accident in Coleraine. I was out at the flat at Agincourt trying to ring Dad to give me a lift home cos it was so wet. I kept ringing but there was no answer. At about 10 Ronan D told me that Ronan W told him that my parents were in Portstewart. Dad went up to see how they were, which is why i couldnt get in contact with him. So they all stayed in Portstewart and i got the house to myself. Unfortunately i couldnt take advantange because i had to get up
early this morning. 

So this morning i got up at 8:30. I phoned the school at about 10am and got my results. CCD. I needed CCD. Then i got changed and went into town for interview at Dunnes Stores. It went alright i think. Afterwards i walked around town for a while trying to get job application forms. Got a form for the Gadget Shop and Phones 4U. Anyway - when i got home i looked up Magee's website and tried to find out what to do about my results. After a while i noticed that it said "including CC" that made me think i had gotten in. I saw somewhere else "Minimum of 240 points." Then i found website to translate my grades into points. I someone calculated that i got 240 points and then got all excited for 5 minutes. Then i did it again and realised that i only got 220 points. I was gona phone the university and find out what could be done. Then at the bottom of the page with the contact details it had a link to a site. So i went to the site and keyed in my application number. Then i was brought to a page that i now love. Well underneath the word "Decision" was the words "Accepted and Placed." I now love those words!!

From that moment on i have been pretty much on a high. I am so happy that im going to be going to University. The moment i have been waiting for for a long time. Moving out of this house and moving out of Belfast!! I just couldnt be happier right now!

subject: Disneyland
body: So i've been lazy lately and not bothered to update this - but i want to and am definately going to do it now! We got back from Paris on Wednesday. I great 6 days! We left on Thursday at about 12. Arrived at about 4pm. Got coach from the Airport to Disneyland. I knew we had arrived when i saw the first huge hotel, then the rest soon after - they are massive! We arrived at ours eventually. The Kryiad was the hotel we stayed at. Very nice, very big! The first night we just took the bus from the hotel to the Disney Village (free entry area with clubs, bars, restaurants and shops), just took a look around the place. The next day we got up early for breakfast at 9am. This consisted of a few croissants, yoghurt and another bread type thing or two. On the first day we went to the most recent of the two Parks: Walt Disney Studios. Disney Studios was great. Lots of special effects, rides and adventures into the world of Disney, that sorta stuff. The weather was amazing which added to it all! I went on the Aerosmith Rock 'n Roller Coaster - which was amazing. I dont usually do well on rollercoasters, but this was great. It lined up and counted down from 3. Then it went off at high speed into the darkness. The track went all over the place in what seemed like a very small room in almost complete darkness with the occasional bit of blue and silver track. Next we went on the Armageddon (special effects) thing. It was... well not that good really, just a room that shook around, a few flames and lots of smoke. Next was the Studio Tram Tour. This tour brought you round the back area of the park. Some very nice effects, shown here! One of the best shows was at the Moteurs Action Stunt Show. THis included some nice explosions and fireworks: Later we caught the 3pm Studios Parade. Goofy prancing around: Tinkerbell Mickey and Minnie Mouse Donald Duck On Saturday we headed straight for the main Park The Main Entrance Went on Big Thunder Mountain - surprisingly not as scary as I was expecting - but fun all the same! We took a nice boat ride around part of the park. Unlike the Tram, nothing exciting happened at all. Later we caught the evening parade and fireworks display: Overall - I had a great time at Disneyland, i just would have preferred if we had stayed for only 2 days and not 3 as we had really seen most things by the 3rd day and i was pretty bored of it and desperately wanted to go on to Paris.

subject: Gaye Paris
body: So on Sunday 29th August we packed our stuff and placed it in the safety of the hotel while we went off for our 3rd and final day of Disneyland enjoyment. After a few hours of wandering around the park on my own trying to take it all in while my dad and and bro went on the Pirates of the Carribbean ride again (for the third time) we finally went back to the hotel to get our stuff and then to the train station. Off the train and onto the appriate metro line to the nearest station from the hotel. Hotel Novanox. It wasnt as good as the one in disneyland, or as big by far - but it was still nice and the people who ran it were pretty nice. On the first evening i didnt bring camera. We went to the Eiffel Tower, which looked amazing all lite up. The next day we got up early for breakfast and headed out to Notre Dame. Just a huge cathederal really - very nice on the inside! No flash photography they say. The huge stained glass window inside the church: Later we went to Eiffel's Tower - this time went up it, right to the top! What a view Later we took a boat trip along the River Seine - which is where i took this pic from One of the beautiful bridges along the river Day two - We left the hotel at about 11 and I went around on my own until meeting the parents again at about 4pm. I went to a History Museum and tried to go the Picasso Museum but it was closed on Tuesdays - really anoyed at that. Hotel de Ville - I love the buildings in Paris - everyone is so spectacular! Moulin Rouge Finally - The Lourve. Unfortunately we didnt get to go in as it was closed when we went and this was on the final evening. Such a beautiful place! Yes i had a great time and will definately be going back!!!

subject: Goodbye Dear Nilfisk
body: I just did the hoovering for the final time before i move out!! I will miss this thing... .... not

subject: Last Night
body:
This is my last night in this house for a week. Then after next weekend i prob wont be home for about 2 weeks. Im moving to Derry tomorrow, and yes i am bloody excited! 

Gona be getting up at about 8 to put everything in the car and hopefully leave before 11am. When i get there im gona unpack for a bit then go for lunch with the parents, do some shopping then send them off on their way, as quickly as possible. Then i plan to sit in the students union bar for the rest of the night!

I keep y'all updated. Im very much lookin forward to this! 

Finally - out of the house. My own boss, so to speak. No one to tell me when to come home, when to go out, when to tidy, wash, go to bed, not to smoke in the house etc. Should be good!!

subject: The Bunker
body:
So yesterday was my first day of classes. Up at 9:15 for first class. Got in and the lecturer simply said, "Anyone who doesnt have a seat come back in an hour." As it happened i did have a seat. He just showed us his website where we can get information on all the modules, he also puts up work and assignments on the net. He also gave us all our usernames and passwords for the network. Mine didnt work. An hour later he let us go, then i went to the library for a while. At 3:15 we had a course induction for the whole faculty (of engineering). This was taken by the course co-ordinator. He basically went through all the rules, regulations and structure of the year and courses. 

After that we were given a talk by the people in charge of the Halls and went bowling with everyone from the halls. It was quite good, plus we got free food!

We got back at around 9pm then went to the students union bar shortly after. There was a 'disco' on later. THe doors to the other bar opened at about 11pm i think. The night started out with me going to the bar to get some drinks, only to find some nice girls sittin at our table. Got chattin to them and their friends came and more of our friends came and more (cheap) drink was bought and it was a great night! 

Then i hit my head on the wall as i rushed to get up from my bed to go the toilet. Hopefully this red mark on my forehead wont turn into a bruise.

Today i ate a banana! 

Then i went to class for 2 hrs from 9am, got hair cut, bought nail varnish remover, phoned BT, watched some TV and here i am. Later i got class from 5-8pm: algorithmic programming!

subject: Home Sweet Home
body:
I got the train at 11:25 and arrived at central station at 1:30. Mum picked me up and i went with chris to Forbidden Planet and spent £10 on commics. Then went home, got food and went out with ronan. First we went to Laverys and played some pool then to the Front Page and saw three really crap bands; Fool, The Dangerfields and some other band. Eventually after spending 45 minutes trying to get a taxi we finally got one. That morning i woke up. Went to Lisburn with ronan and his mum to get him a new digital camera. Then on to grannys for the usual family gathering and lots of drink. At 9pm i got train back to Derry again. 

I brought some clothes with me to get washed, but the damn dishwasher was broken. Then my dad managed to fix it on sunday but it was too late 'cos i wasnt home at all on sunday. I also forgot to bring my new 160GB hard drive back with me. Gonna get mum to post it i think, cos i wont be going home next weekend and i cant survice 2-3 weeks more without it.

subject: Oops
body: Dad caught me smokin outside my granny's house on sunday! He was up the drive way and i was with rach on the street. He called me just as i had the cigarette in my mouth and he saw it. I walked up to him and he gave me a really angry look and said, "Don't ever let me catch you doing that again!" I doubt he will tell my mum and hopefully wont mention it again.

subject: On behalf of the class...
body:
Woke up this afternoon at 1pm, class at 1:15 - hugely hungover!

Tried watching Pirates of the Carribbean again last night when i got in. Got about 3/4 of the way through. 

Today i became Class Rep. Hopefully it wont be too demanding, Christine says i will crack under the pressure but i can handle it. 

Working tonight 6pm - 12am. Im really really tired now i dont know how im gona cope in work so long and so late i may have to do something about these hours soon.

subject: Savvy?
body: Got home from work at about 1:30 last night and began to watch Pirates of the Caribbean again, determined to watch it all this time. I did watch it all, then proceeded to watch all of the special features on the other disc. Some very informative stuff about pirates. At 5:30 i walked the 10mins to the 24hr garage and got me some more cigarettes a pot noodle, super noodles, bread and milk. When i got back, finished watching special features, then watched the movie again, though i fell asleep half way through (at about 7:30am). Woke up at 5:30 and put the movie on again, this time from chapter 10 to the end. It really is a great movie and i do love Johnny Depp, i mean - what a guy, everything he says and does makes me laugh. As for now, im in 24hr computer suite. Need to get some food soon, then probably gona go to the cinema to see Layer Cake - looks good. I could have gone home this weekend, just like the vast majority of other students around me but I dont like to go home every weekend 'cos i love my freedom and independence, even if there isnt anything to do here by myself, but thats part of it, finding things to do. Learning to survive on my own, cos really, we are all alone, and if you can survive by yourself then your doin fine - thats my way of looking at it. Of course, if anyone would like to join me here some weekend, you're very welcome to do so, Damn its dark. It really wasnt that dark 20mins ago.

subject: Anyone?
body: I fucking love being here, new life, new start, new friends, no parents and time to be independent and discover what i want to do with myself; live my life exactly how i want to and do whatever the fuck i want and have no one stop me. Though there is the odd time of loneliness, such as weekends. I dont want to do home every weekend because i like being on my own, i.e. away from my parents. I know it sounds like a bit of a contracdiction. But i know that if i go home every weekend i will just sit around at home and be bored... maybe it is a little better than being bored here with no one to talk to at all, but i dont have the freedom to do whatever the fuck i want when i go home. Yeah this is very strange i know... unless you do understand. So last weekend i didnt go home and did spend a hell of a lot of time alone. On Friday night i was working until 1am. When i got home made some food and began watching Pirates of the Caribbean all night. I slept until saturday evening then i went to the cinema that evening. After the cinema I got some alcohol started drinking when I got back to my room. Alone. Obviously not something im going to make a habit of. I did get a little drunk, was listening to great music all night that made me feel really good. But i was lonely. I desperately wanted to talk to someone. Desperately wanted the internet so i could sit on msn. Sent a txt or two, with no luck in getting any replies. Generally feeling pretty depressed. Thinking of the few people that are close to me in my life, i mean, 'what-the-fuck'?? I often feel that no one will ever be able to understand me. I am too jaded. I find it hard to converse with people because everything is a cliché and it annoys me. I all too often sit in a crowded room and say nothing because whenever someone does say something its always something stupid, that i probably could have said but thought it wasnt worth while. As Marilyn Manson said, "There's nothing left to say anymore, everything's been said before." Okay so that's meant in a different context, but its the same idea. It does often come to my mind that i could be anyone. Not to be fake or artificial, but when meeting someone for the first time i could be wild and crazy and say all manner of things that to other people may seem out of character, but i find it hard to do that. I have met a lot of new people lately, but havent been as different as i would have liked to have been. Yeah, everyone says 'just be yourself' but when yourself doesnt get you anywhere you want to try something different. I try, and am gona try harder. If it doesnt work then i'll just go back to my usual silent, pensive, people-watching, forward-thinking, always thinking, never-talking sorta guy. I'll let you know how I get on.

subject: Good start!
body:
Had class test for Programming module - in which im learning Java - Tuesday. It was done on computers, over a website set up by the university. 50 multiple choice questions, 50 minutes to do it. Whenever you  are finished you hit 'Submit' at the buttom of the page and on the following page the mark is displayed. I spent the day before and morning before studying very hard. Going through all the notes we had been given over the last 3 weeks. It payed off. I got 81%. Surprisingly better than anyone else that i know!! Found out today that the average was 64%. So as you can imaging Im pretty damn pleased with that! 

Im still very confused by some stuff and although I did well in the test I cant even programe much yet, still a little behind with that aspect of things. But I got such a good grade by studying hard beforehand and Im determined to continue to read notes and keep up on stuff contuniously. 

Yesterday I decided not to go to lecture i had at 9am, instead i stayed in bed until 2:30. Went into town about an hour later, brought back something and changed something else. 

I tried to get my bank account upgraded to a student account but i was DECLINED! Im not pleased about that at all! Im only 19, I have have a job for 3 years always having money going into my account. Maybe its something to do with the fact that I would have about £200 go in every month then by the end of the month it would often be down to nothing... That could be the reason, and the fact that when i had my contract phone 2 years ago i didnt make payments on time twice... aw well, Im determined never to get a contract phone again so i wont have that problem again. Im also from now on going to go easy on my money. Ive upgraded my computer (though i still need to get a new monitor), Ive bought plenty of clothes, few CDs quite a few DVDs (Pulp Fiction, Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind, Wonderland, Butterfly Effect, Good Will Hunting, Kill Bill Vol 2, I think thats it) and spent lots of money on radom crap. 

Im gona learn how to cook so that im not spending so much money eating every day, I will spend less on alcohol, when im drinking I will just buy a 1/4 of vodka - much cheaper than anything else! 

Etc Etc. 

Im going home this weekend and plan to just spend time with my family, parents and brother - whom i miss and know misses me.

subject: Well that was worth every minute
body: I went home on saturday morning, arriving at central station at 1:30 - only to be treated like shit by my mum for most of the weekend. Mainly due to the fact that ive run out of money... and maybe she has some reason to be anoyed, but not to be such a fucking bitch about it all fucking weekend! So maybe i have spent a little too much money in the last 4 weeks, but not that much was a waste really. I did buy a printer, new mobile, new hard drive, have to pay part of university fees (which i will be getting back whenever my mum eventually pays em), and food and lots of drink etc. But being typically her, she just went on and on and on and on and on about it all weekend. This is exactly why i am so glad that ive moved out! I listen to her, a little, when shes around, and when im not near her i completely block her out and ignore it all, in a way. Yes i am going to be more careful with my money but i can learn this myself. I still have my loan to get, and im getting paid this friday, so i only needed to lend of money for a few days. On a lighter note, I went to the cinema to see Shark Tale, then met ronan and ronan for a few games of pool and couple of drinks. I went home at 10pm cos i was tired and wanted to spend some time in the comfort of my own house (obviously ignoring my mum). I just sat on the computer for a while and watched some TV. It was good. And i got to sleep in my own bed, which is a lot better than the one i have here, though this one isnt too bad. I also have nicer pillows at home and im going to bring one of them back with me next time im home. On sunday we went to grannys and... well didnt do anything that exciting really; watched friends (yay(!)). Got home, put clothes in dryer, went on computer, packed, moved TV from the landing outside my room into my room, so chris can enjoy it in there instead of in the landing where it can be heard and if mum's on the computer she thinks she can just call up every second. Its really anoying when you're playing games or watching tv/dvd. Got train at 9:15, arrived back at 11:30, got bus from train station to uni and walked from uni to halls. When i got in i unpacked and started to sort out some more of my stuff in preparation for puttin it all onto cds. Then played Burnout on PS2 with flatmate and this is turning into too much of a 'Dear Diary, today i did this then this then did a shit followed by..." - you get the idea, its not what i was going for, never again. Going to see HIM tomorrow!!!

subject: HE was FUCKING AWESOME!!
body: Not long back from one of the greatest nights ever! HIM fucking rule!! I also met drunken Pete - great guy!

subject: My man!
body:
Just got email back from James. I do love hearing from him. It always makes me want to save loads of money and get my ass over to Rhode Island! But its hard to save. I dont have that much money available I dont really work more than about 15 hrs a week (doing 18 this week) wouldnt often get paid more than £300 and have a tendancy to spend a lot of money when i do have some. For instance - ive spend about £500 in the last 4 weeks. Plus im about to order a new monitor (£70) and im even contemplating new motherboard and processor... I just cant help it. I love my computer and use it everyday and i can never understand why its never as good as everyone elses. Then of course i like to go out occasionally, unfortunately i dont actually have that many days that i can stay out late/get drunk due to class hours. Then again that could be a good thing; save some money. And finally, i have to survive. I gotta feed myself now. Which i enjoy doing, i just gotta learn to cook stuff other than microwaveable stuff and sausages and waffles. I would give anything for a big stir fry... havent had one in years. 

If anyone has any ideas as to how i can live cheaply, and still survive and not fade away completely please, please bring them forward.

subject: Another one of those entries
body:
Could it be possible that i am incapable of showing affection towards members of the opposite sex? Im just too much of an outsider. I analyse things a lot and have many different interests from other people. I would consider myself to be smart and intelligent - whether you do or not - and im not very good at the whole acting cool and dancing in club shit. Everything is just filled with clichés and im not very good at that. 

So i got a girl that i dont know that well standing/sitting right beside me in club/flat what the fuck do i do? Make conversation i would assume - and talk about what, the fucking weather? Its just all so goddamn ackward! 

FUCK FUCK FUCK i hate it!

subject: Feel-Me Phil
body:
Damn it does feel good to walk into a room and have  10+ people call you name (Even if it is "Sainsburys Phil" or Feel-Me Phil"). Last night i went over the one of the other blocks (friend in my flat has friends there) and we sat around for a while drinking, eating chinese and smokin pot. Then at around 10:30 we went to 'Frisco's Student Disco' at the Carraig, it was better than i thought it would be. After a while in there, we moved on to Earth next door. It was also pretty damn good, a lot better than i thought it would be and not half as packed as i was expecting. After much drinking and dancing like an idiot we all left at about 2am. When i got out i found more people that i know. We walked back, and got stopped by police and told to keep quiet, then rachel started chattin to one of them and gave him a friendly slap on the chest and one guy said "how many years for assaulting an officer" and he said "i'll let her off this time." I found it rather scary and funny. 

Got back and shifted between 4 flats (in 3 different blocks) for the next couple of hours, talkin to people, eating a pot noodle in someone elses kitchen, smokin pot and talkin to more people. 

I finally went to my own room and to bed at about 4am. Then i watched 2 Episodes of The Shield. During watching Dilly knocked on my door askin me for a lighter and said there was 'a session' goin on but it was too late i was lyin in bed so i didnt bother. 

I woke up this morning at 9:30 and said "fuck it" and didnt bother going to class, instead i stayed in bed until 3pm. Then i got up got a shower had a bowl of Weetabix and left to go to the library. And here i am, at the library.

subject: More credit!
body: On Saturday I had £10 credit On Sunday it had gone down to £8.50 On Monday I had £10.50 On Tuesday I had £9.00 On Wednesday I have £11.46 I have no idea why - but my phone credit has been increasing over the last few days and i have no idea why. I am not by any means complaing - but quite freaked out.

subject: I love The Shield
body:
Last night I sat up and watched The Shield Season 1 DVD until 5am. I fucking love the show so much, I just cant stop watching it. Im determined to watch all 4 disks by tomorrow. Im half way through disk 2 so im getting there.

My phone credit has gone up again to - fuck just checked again and its gone up even more than earlier.
When i checked a while ago it was at £11.50 or so - now its at £12.09. This is insane but im not complaining!!

Im off to eat then goin to work from 6pm to 12am

What you dressin up as for halloween?

subject: Madison Avenue
body:
Ronan left 2 hrs ago for the train. We went to a bar called Metro. I even got into a conversation with a girl! She was a little older than I and I wasnt actually interested in pursuing anything. She had asked the guy that came over if he or anyone else could make a 'Madison Avenue.' He came back a few mins later and said no. I then asked her what a 'Madison Avenue was and she told me and said she got it in belfast etc. Of course I forget now, then few mins later they went. It was interesting really. Maybe I could do it again... though can it be done without the help of drugs? 

Went home at about 11pm and watched The Shield all night. I got him hooked. 

I also spent a few hours tidying my room yesterday morning before he came, I even hoovered it too! Looked pretty damn impressive, now theres cans of coke all over the place - i may have drunk a little too much coke over the last week or so. Definately smoked too much - about 25 cigarettes yesterday! Im definately gona go easy on them for a while!

subject: <<~~Phone Credit Update~~>>
body: Today I have £14.85 on my phone

subject: RAAA!
body:
Im sick - im very fucking sick!! 

Too often am I in my room during the day and feeling very cold. 

Too often do i feel extremely tired during the day and occasionally sleep for a while.

Too often am i going out to drink and coming home between Sunday and Tuesday when I have class at 9am the next day.

Im sitting in practical class at the minute wishing that i hadnt gotten up this morning, its just not worth it. I could be getting some more sleep and not be too tired to revise for test i have later - which i really gotta revise for!

And on top of everything, this computer is being really gay and slow. 

Fuck it - im going!

subject: Too tired
body:
Ever get the feeling you're being ignored? 

A few 'friends' of mine went to the cinema yesterday to see the orignal Alien. Although I'm not really interested in it I said I would probably go. Later they called me to go to bar with them, they were on their way back from the cinema! I got some much-needed sleep, but the point is they went and didnt tell me. Ach I really dont give a fuck, they not lots of fun anyway. They live in the same flat and cant seem to do anything without the rest of them. As for me, im pretty friendly with some people, would like to be a bit more friendly with a few more people, but i do like doing things on my own - enough ranting.

Yesterday we went to Earth - it was pretty shit. I just cant stand dance clubs if im not drunk or otherwise intoxicated. I was just so tired from the night before. I had a 2 drinks and felt like shit. But i didnt want to leave 'cos i'd spent a fiver gettin in. After a while we found some comfy seats and had a few more drinks, and a couple of hours later I wasnt feeling too bad. I mean seriously, you dont go straight from the cinema, or lying in bed as i was, to a club, you need to have a few drinks before hand!

I still havent decided what im doing this weekend. Im not sure whether im working or not on saturday, I'll find that out tomorrow in work. If I am working then i wont be going home, obviously. It shouldnt be as lonely around the halls this weekend as I know a lot of people are planning on staying to make the most of Halloween. But I just dont feel up to drinkin much for a while. I dont even know if i want to go out on Sunday (hallween night) 'cos i have class on Monday morning, a class i should really go to as i havent been to it for 2 weeks, and my 'group' my feel im not taking part in the assignment enough, even though we have another 6 weeks or so to have it done. On top of that I dont have a great deal of money left this month (decided not to get the monitor yet). 

If im not working, then i will probably go home; I havent been home in 2 (maybe 3) weeks. But then I still cant decide whether i should come back early on Sunday for the halloween crap. Some sort of carnival/parade starting at 5 at the university car park, moving to the city centre for fireworks and DJs later. I just cant be bothered. Such a crap holiday - though not even a holiday for us student and I have to get up at 9am the next morning!! AHH!!!

subject: On a lighter note
body: IM GOING TO SEE GREEN DAY IN JANUARY!!!

Yestserday I was almost pursuated to stay here this weekend, but then I remembered about my brother, and the fact that I havent seen him in about 3 weeks. I am going home early on saturday morning and coming back on sunday evening. In time to get drunk and see fireworks and the usual halloween shit - well im not gonna sit in on my own. 

I think ive got a cold, and Im starting work at 7pm until 1am. Gotta run. Need food too.

subject: Too much drink, too much money... and where has it left me?
body: I have spent far too much money lately! I bought drink yesterday, saturday and a couple of days before that. As well as drink I have done shopping, and I spend more money on food than I know I should. Right now I have less money than I should/need to last me until i get paid again in two weeks and any time now more will come out for dvds that I bought a few days ago and money came out in the last few days for services that I dont even use but havent bothered to cancel. Its just not working out. So going back a bit, I was really going to go home on saturday, maybe even come back again that night, but I was going to go home. As it happened, I couldnt sleep (because I havent gone to sleep early in so long its hard to do it once so Im going to have to force myself into a routine), so at 6:33am I was still awake. I had watched a dvd, read a comic, started reading some of my new book, drew some crappy doodles, anything to keep me occupied until 7:am when I had planned to get a taxi to the train station - I realised that if I did go to sleep I wouldnt get up on time, so I didnt go to sleep. But then the worst thing happened, I woke up, looked at my clock and it said 12:35pm. "Fuck, I fell asleep!" I was very annoyed. I was meeting Christine for lunch, I knew ronan would be pissed, not that I care that much whether he's pissed-off or not, but I do hate him yellin at me cos he's pissed at something I did, and I miss my bro and wanted to see him this weekend. Its been 3 weeks (I think) since I've been home so Im definately going home next week - better not be working (I wish fuckin job would get my name on the fucking schedule so I'd know which fucking saturdays Im supposed to be working!) So I woke up at 12:35 and was really tired so didnt bother to move for about 1/2 an hour after that. Mum called, I told her how it happened, and she hung up on me again :( When I got up I went into town with a friend and bought some make-up for 'dressing up' and did a 'bit' of shopping in Tescos. Then back to the flat to drink and... well i cant really remember what I did on saturday, oh yeah, just drank in the flat with friends, probably went out somewhere at some point. I was so pissed off - I drank quite a lot, but wasnt overly drunk, or as drunk as I probably should have been - I have a pretty high tolarance to drink and its so bloody annoying. I think my body takes an outsiders point of view/cynical attitude, as well as my mind, stopping me from getting very drunk and going very crazy/losing control often. I dont like it much, I just end up wasting a lot of money! Yesterday, I got up at about 4, ate made myself up, a little, bought some more drink (which got lost later!) and headed to the ball in the union at 9pm, because I didnt have a ticket I wasnt very hopeful about getting in, so when I saw a friend heading in the opposite direction I went with him. We found some other friends who were heading to a bar in town. I went and didnt stay that long, I was tired and hungry and the music was shit. So I left at about 11:30 I think and got a curry chip at a chinese nearby. Then got a taxi back to the flat and drank for a bit with a friend... well he drank I was just fed up. On another note - I joined the gym today! cost a tenner... that could have bought me cigarettes... or drink - but no, im gonna get fit!

Why the fuck did i only get paid £85 for a months work!! I have really been looking forward to today for the la st week or so as i've run out of money. I was expecting £250-£300 but when ive only got £85!! This is a fucking outrage! Im working at 7pm (until 1am ) so im going to march over to personnel and say 'YO! What the fuck's the matter wit' you! I work hard all month and get squat! You should be ashamed of yourself! I quit!' Ahhhhh to quit sainsburys... *UPDATE* It turns out that I have been using the wrong clock-in number in work, though i was never told i would have to use a new one, or given a new on for that matter, when i moved stores so its not my fault. But then it makes me wonder, how come i got paid right last month, and managed to get £85 this month? Did the computer just realise overnight that it didnt have the foggiest idea who the hell i was?

Caught the train back again at 7:20, got lift home and... I went and smoked a joint while chris played Age of Empires then i watched Bridget Jones' Diary. Now I'm going to play Age of Empires and drink a can of coke.

subject: I dream of... Age of Empires?
body:
Yeah most people may dream of... well whatever you dream of, but last night - actually i think it was more this morning - i dreamt about Age of Empires, you know, the game:

My alarm went off at about 2pm and i hit the snooze button so many times every 9 minutes after it went off again and suddenly i realised it was because i didnt have enough food that it kept going off so i collected more food and and the alarm stopped going off.

It was wierd.

I havent been on the internet in ages.

Sainsburys did give me some money, but on just last night, and only £40. The bitch said she owed me only £90 but i think it should be about £160. But she couldnt even give me back the whole £90, no she only gave me £40. So i had to phone my mum to ask her for some...

Its not going well at all on the money side of things either...

Im beginning to see what its like not having any money. I gotta survive another 3 weeks unitl i get paid again... or sell something on ebay...

In all, i havent done much over the last few days. I went out on wednesday to the union. Worked on thursday and worked on friday. On days that im working i never seem to do anything else, even though i dont start until 6 or 7pm. I just sleep until about 2 hours before i gotta go to work. Then come home watch tv and smoke lots...

If anyone has any suggestions for ways i could make some money please share them.
Any donations will be greatly appreciated. Please send to philipokane@ntlworld.com via www.paypal.com

subject: The microwaves broken
body:
One of my flatmates told me last night that the microwave in the kitchen is broken. I used it earlier anyway. I didnt feel so good for about 20 mins after i ate this normally extremely yummy meal. 

Today i got up at 4pm. Watched tv for a bit then went to sainsburys. Bought hair gel, sleeping tablets and spaghetti carbonara and tobacco. Back to the flat - smoked a joint and out again. This time i remembered to post the letter i should have posted a week ago! Sent reciept for mum to bring something back for me and Nightwish's Once album for my bro and Age of Empires cd. 

Lately ive just been smokin and watchin tv/dvds. Nothing too exciting and i expect it will be like this for the next few weeks until i get paid again. Im also gonna run out of dope in that time... I'll find some way of coping im sure. 

Ive done a lot of thinking over the last few days... cos thats what happens when u smoke dope for hours on end alone. I have made out a few plans for myself. A budget, Im gona make daily plans, maybe, and try to keep to em, so i study when i should etc and dont forget to do everything. 

On a lighter note - we got a new iron. Im going to do some ironing soon, and enjoy it. Ive only ironed twice since i got here. 

More crap same time next week

All clean and ready to be put in ur mouth if or eaten off? I want clean soap!

body:
Well i thought about it, due to the fact that i only got up at 3:30pm and I have no money, I did not buy soap. But i did think about buying soap. 

One of the worst things thats been happening to me lately is not being able to sleep. Insomnia. Last night i was tossing and turning, listening to music, i read, watched The Shield (but that could never make me sleepy), smoked a few joints, the usual - but nothing worked. I finally got to sleep at about 5:30am. I was supposed to get up at 8am this morning. I only woke at 9am, which was strange cos i set my alarm for 8am - just proves that if im rea lly tired i can sleep through the alarm for an hour. Even though I bought some crappy sleepin tablets in sainsburys - they did no good at all. I know the same is going to happen tonight cos im just not tired and wont be for hours yet...

So anyway, ive been telling her that i havent been sleeping lately. I want her to post some melatonin to me, but she's reluctant to do so. She also diagnosed me with Clinical Depression. Amazing. Could very well be true.

subject: It didnt work
body: No matter how hard I tried, I just couldnt go to sleep. It was between 5:30 and 6am that I finally managed to get to sleep. I woke up at 1pm to the most irritating music from the guy in the room next to me. It was the most unbearable pop crap ever. But no matter how many times i tried to get up, i just couldnt do it. I did however get up 3 hours later. It was hard. My head hurt. I felt really sick, still dont feel great, but im up, isnt that the main thing? Im in the library and i have been considering doing some work! Yup i brought my Java text book and an exercise book and im going to go down to the desks and try learning some stuff. Last night at about 7pm i was asked by one of my flatmates if i wanted to go out. Of course i want to go out. But i couldnt, cos ive no money. Later i went to the shop at 11:30pm and 15-20 were walkin down the road as i was walking back one after the other many of them called my name sayin why i wasnt goin out. Its a nice thing to happen. I just wish now that i have some friends i had money to go out... I just know tonight is going to be exactly the same. Im trapped.

I managed to get up today at 12pm. On time for class at 1pm. Now on break between class. Gotta go back. 

Although I got up earlier than i have in a while and wasnt too tired when i woke, i didnt get to sleep until 6am. I was lying down at 1:30 after reading and playing with my belly button. But then I got bored and really into the book. It felt like I'd stopped a film half way through, so i read a bit more. Then played Snake on my phone and got 1115, then watched some skiing on 4 then tried going to sleep again. Eventually I did. Today im working until 12am. Hopefully i will be tired when i finish and be able to sleep soon after.

Im going to die out here and ive got no one to help me...

subject: Today i sharpened a pencil
body:
I was pretty tired when i got back to my room yesterday. I watched a bit of tv, read some of my book, studied a little and ate a pizza. I was asleep between 10:30 and 11pm, im so proud. I got up this morning at 10:30am. Its not as early as it should be but its a hell of a good start. I was going to go to sleep at 8 or 9pm, but i got hooked on tv. I dont like tv. It cures my boredom, but i find that im just watching so much crap and wasting so much time. 

I am really considering getting the internet in my room next semester. Ive gone a little (huge understatement) nuts with money this semester, and I have had very very very little (litterally living on less than £2 a day) over the last two weeks. This was due to that fact that I had spent all my money and wa s relying on my pay. But sainsburys fucked up. I was forced to call my mum yesterday and (literally) beg for some more money. Just checked and she very kindly put £20 in my bank. I can now live for another few days. 

I did sharpen a pencil today. Havent done that in about 2 years... It felt good.

subject: I quit smoking...
body:
Today, until the time that i next have money/have a drink/someone offers me a cigarette i officially quit smoking.

Its gonna be tough, but its for the best, probably. Apart from the fact that I only have £20 to last me until next week, as well as train ticket home - okay thats asking a bit much outta £20, but the point is I have very little money and just cant afford it.

So I need to think of things to keep me occupied during the day. I do have a very short attention span. Which is why I was considering getting a games console. Although if i had the internet that would solve so many problems. I could refrain from smoking, not watch tv, be able to get more music, it would be academically benificial. Its a tough call, 'cos it is quite expensive - but its been very hard without it and ive only been here 3 months. Another 5 months like this and I think im likely to go completely nuts!

Im off to see what he's at, and get these 2 pints off him for talking to a random girl beside me...

subject: Cant say I didnt try...
body:
Got up at 12:30, went to class at 1:15. Class finished 40mins early. Went to Student Support, asked for nurse, nurse at conference. I try again tomorrow. 

I havent had a cigarette for a full two days. I dont feel too bad. There was a brief moment before i went to bed last night when i realisd and thought there was something missing, but other than thats it hasnt been too bad. I borrowed a few games from flatmate (Duke Nukem!), so my mind has been occupied. Although I had completely forgotten about work. What will I do when i get the urge to take a break and go for a smoke?? I dont know how I will cope. Its like a rule, I have to have at least one smoke break any time im at work. Ive always done it... Damn! I hope this works. Ive come so far (yes i consider two days quite far) I cant give in now!

subject: I feel trapped
body: As much as i was loving it here, i have been feeling very trapped here in the last couple of weeks. Of course having no money has not helped at all. Its like being stuck at school. I cant run anywhere. I cant do anything. Cant go home, cant drink, cant go to the cinema... cant do very much. Things have just gone completely wrong. I was talkin to my parents on the phone last night. It didnt go well at all. I bought a pkt of cigarettes afterwards. I do however realise having done that that i dont want to smoke anymore at all and that I can do it. I had my last cigarette this morning and made a conscious decision that it will be my last. I really didnt enjoy that pkt very much. Two days without smoking has done me a lot of good, and so will the next many days to come. I just gotta find stuff to do in its place. work went ok without takin a smoke break. I got home, watched Blow with directors commentary then learned about chemical reactions on BBC Bitesize. Then read, and stared into space for a while... at 6am I got up and watched GMTV and listened to the Chilis. I went to sleep at 8:30am and got up at 3:30pm. With much pursuation I have a little more money. I might treat myself to the cinema tonight...

subject: I wanna get drunk...
body:
I got home from work at about 10:40 and put on some great loud music and really wanted to be drunk and happy, its not fair! But I dont have enough money, and its too depressing just bein drunk in a room with only music (loud and great music of course). 

It really was stupid of me not to get the internet in a few months ago. I just cannot live without access to the outside world. Im too damn lonely and and have been feeling trapped (as mentioned previously) recently having to contend myself with all that I have in my room. I need to know whats going on. I need to be able to talk to people etc. Next semester will be so much different. 

I found out he other day that my one and only exam is on 11th Jan. Which means I will be free from 12th - 24th January! In that time I hope to spend much of it intoxicated! You are very welcome to join me!
Its 4am and im still over at the uni on the net. Ive had a great time. Reading about blogs and of modern day journalism. Wikipedia - what a great invention Current Terror Alert Level

All I have to do now is revise for test tomorrow. Multiple choice. Hopefully I'll do ok - just worked it out! I only need ONE mark in this test to pass the module!! ONE mark!! SWEEEET! So after test tomorrow I have no more work to do! Other than working sainburys wednesday and thursday. Then im goin home on friday! Its been a month since Ive been home and I cant wait!!

subject: I want a cigarette!
body:
Ive just come out of my final test for my programming module. It was fuckin tough. I got 48%. Shit, I know, Im just hoping its enough...

Right now i really really want a cigarette. I was one of the last left to do the test. I hit the 'submit' button with 01 seconds to go.

December 7, 2004 5:11pm Quiz submitted  59:59 00:01

Anyway, enough of that. Its over. Im not gonna worry about it. Im just gonna buy a packet of cigarettes and some alcohol!

I was at work until 10pm and dont have enough money to go out never mind get drunk. I spend ages on the phone with my mum then arranging my weekend with ronan. I cant fucking wait to go home tomorrow. My dads comin' to pick me up at about 12pm and we go for lunch or whatever. Its also his birthday tomorrow and having -£34 in my bank has meant that I havent been able to get him anything. I would like to go to town early and get something before he gets here but I doubt very much I will be able to get up early enough and I have no idea what to get him... When I get home I'm gonna eat. Then Im gonna eat more. After that I may eat a little more. Then gonna go to the cinema with bro to see The Incredibles, which I'm really looking forward to. Then gonna set up my computer and hopefully set the net up in my room. Anyone who I havent seen in we gotta meet up over xmas!! Only 16 hours to go! P.S. I found out that I passed one of my modules! Im just up 10mins. Im going to work in 15mins. Working 30 hours in total this week. I work on the deli counter and it changes between being pretty busy to being really boring. But its certainly nice being back home. I fuckin' hate the store in Derry.

It was so weird. When I moved it felt like time was going really slowly. I wasnt sure if i moved or not, my eyes where having trouble cathing up with my movements. subject: One hour to go
body: Its 1300, my exam is at 1400. Im scared, cos i know im going to fuck up... I arrived here at about 3pm yesterday afternoon, spoke to a couple of people in my flat, but mostly revised and watched tv. Ive been thinking about so much over the last couple of weeks, maybe living away from home isnt what i was meant to do afterall. Or maybe it is infact that I have discovered much more about myself and the people around me recently than before. I have discovered that there are so many people that I love dearly and that I do have some great friends at home. I've been thinking about maybe going home to work every weekend 'cos I hate the store here and then i'd also be able to see people at home. That does mean having to go home every weekend. I've also been thinking about the possibility of leaving here and moving back home... I've just had such a fucking amazing time at home over the last few weeks, being with the people I love and working at a place that I like. I want to give it until the end of the year, and I probably will, but its something that i've been thinking about. I'll see how it goes in a few weeks. Im glad I'm going home again tonight after the exam!

subject: ScreenSelect
body:
So a friend told me about Screenselect.co.uk. An online DVD rental site. £9.99 a month, unlimited movies, but only 2 at a time. Free 28-day trial or first 4 free. I signed up on monday. Got my first 2 on Wednesday, watched em and sent em back today. Now I await my next two. I have made a list of the ones I want, so far 114 in list!! 

Its such a great thing. 

Im actually in a rather good mood. Im feeling rather optimistic about the rest of this year... I think I have made my mind up to stay here. I know I'm so fickle, I cant help it. This past week I really havent been bored as much in the same way that I often am. I have watched many dvds, listened to lots of music, watched some crap tv and drank. 

I reserved a place here for next year. I think I can make it work. I will look at the last few months as a learning period, or something like that. I wanna make it work!

I often get tired between 11:30 and 1:30. I feel that if I go to bed then I would be able to sleep then. But i just cant. subject: Slow Dance
body:
Have you ever watched kids
On a merry-go-round?
Or listened to the rain
Slapping on the ground?
Ever followed a butterfly's erratic flight?
Or gazed at the sun into the fading night?
You better slow down.
Don't dance so fast.
Time is short.
The music won't last.
Do you run through each day
On the fly?
When you ask How are you?
Do you hear the reply?
When the day is done
Do you lie in your bed
With the next hundred chores
Running through your head?
You'd better slow down
Don't dance so fast.
Time is short.
The music won't last.
Ever told your child,
We'll do it tomorrow?
And in your haste,
Not see his sorrow?
Ever lost touch,
Let a good friendship die
Cause you never had time
To call and say,"hi"
You'd better slow down.
Don't dance so fast.
Time is short.
The music won't last.
When you run so fast to get somewhere
You miss half the fun of getting there.
When you worry and hurry through your day,
It is like an unopened gift....
Thrown away
Life is not a race,
Do take it slower
Hear the music before the song is over

subject: Crazy Night!
body:
Free House generally equals party. But this party went out of control. I knew it would from the minute loads of spides arrived. It was fine for a while, they did their thing, we continued drinking. Then they started smokin in the house, singing sectarian songs, starting fights, being generally abusive and just being everywhere. 

Then some guy was found lying in the bathroom with his boxers down at his ankles. Took him over an hour to get him out of the house and on the grass. Then someone else was sick - then his dad came. Once the chaos of the paralytic kid was over the spides disappeared. The rest of us got mops, gloves, buckets and hoover and proceeded to clean the house. We also tried to apologise to the neighbour... but she wasnt having any of it. 

Eventually, we got some food and watched a movie. I got 3 hrs sleep on the sofa. Got home at 8, then got another 4hrs. 

Theres really something deeply depressing about hanging out with kids younger than me. And all those damn couples...

I cant fuckin believe they would suspect i would steal money. Fuckin cunts!

subject: Last Night
body:
Only one more night in america. Im very very sad. Been depressed about it a couple of days ago, but now i just cant wait to go out and get drunk tonight. 

Well i havent updated in quite a while. 

It was my birthday on Friday. We went to NYC on friday, which was so much fun. Train into Grand Central, walk  to Time Square, then took a romantic horse and carriage ride through Central Park. That night we went to one of the greatest bars ever at the bottom of Manhatten with an amazing view of the George Washington Bridge. I got so wasted and puked and slept on the subway! Thats an achievment!!

As for the rest of the time - Its just been great! Great friends! Good-times! I dont want to leave!!

subject: Now what?
body:
So Ive been home for two days now and i really dont want to be here. 

It was definately the greatest time of my life. I made great friends and learnt a lot. Now i want to change a lot about myself and my lifestyle. Most importantly I wanna save to go back! 

But until then i am trying to think of how i can achieve the changes i want to make. Its a nice thought... but until i actually get some money i cant really do anything. Though the first thing i am doing is looking for another job. I also wanna spend less time online... easier said than done. Gonna try my hand at reading. I hear its fun. 

Until then Im at quite a loss. Maybe it was just so good 'cos I was on vacation, but i am sure that im able to see past that and it could be much better than this shit-hole. The point is; i wont be here all my life.

This is my life and theres only me. The only person i gotta please is myself. Im not happy and im going to do something about it!

Hello livejournal, its certainly been a while. I must admit though, I havent really missed you... Sorry, but its true. Ive been very busy with proper Blogs and most importantly Photoblogs. Ive been spending every minute of my free time over the last couple of weeks working on the design of my own photoblog as well as working my way around the vast community of others. The internet is such an amazing place. And in many ways it is like a place as opposed to virtual space of writing and images. Its somewhere so many people go to escape the real world, and find can speak to many people in the real world of their experiences, due to other peoples lack of knowledge of how it all works. Its unforuntate really that so many people dont comprehend the extent to which the internet is an amazing place. And for this reason many of my own interests regarding the internet are lost on most people... Not fair really. Anyway - If you check out my site I'll be very happy :)
